m3.pure is vendored verbatim from the FINOS legend-pure project.

  repository: https://github.com/finos/legend-pure
  commit:     8f4632caebd6367ed8cb368a967a44f419df459e
  path:       legend-pure-core/legend-pure-m3-core/src/main/resources/platform/pure/grammar/m3.pure
  license:    Apache-2.0 (see the legend-pure repository)

This file is the bootstrap of the Pure M3 metamodel: every metaclass
(Class, Property, Type, GenericType, Multiplicity, Enumeration, ...) is
written as an instance of meta::pure::metamodel::type::Class using Pure's
low-level instance-construction syntax. pure_python.codegen parses it to
generate the Python representation of the type system.

To refresh: re-clone legend-pure at the desired commit and copy the file
above, then run `python -m pure_python.codegen.generate`.
